page.title: Sri Vidya Vardhini School
page.description: A contemporary Indian school website for a trusted Andhra Pradesh academic institution with admissions, academics, notices, facilities, and parent information.

slides.imageAlt: Indian students learning in a classroom
slides.title: Nurturing Knowledge, Character and Confidence
slides.description: CBSE-oriented education from Nursery to Class XII with disciplined academics, caring teachers and clear communication for parents.

slides.imageAlt: Indian students learning in a science laboratory
slides.title: Strong Foundations for Every Stage of Learning
slides.description: Structured classroom teaching, science learning, library habits and practical activities support academic confidence.

slides.imageAlt: Students participating in sports and cultural activities
slides.title: Learning Beyond the Classroom
slides.description: Sports, cultural programmes, clubs, competitions and assemblies help students grow with confidence.

slides.imageAlt: School campus environment with students and transport
slides.title: A Safe and Supportive Campus for Growing Minds
slides.description: Parent-friendly information on facilities, school timings, transport and contact support is easy to find.

highlights.title: Science and Computer Labs
highlights.label: Facilities
highlights.alt: Students learning in a science event

about.title: A school built around academic discipline and parent trust.
about.text: Sri Vidya Vardhini School supports children through strong classroom teaching, value-based education, structured assessments, and activities that build confidence beyond textbooks.

leadership.title: Guidance from experienced school leadership
leadership.text: A compact leadership message area keeps the focus on school guidance without oversized empty portrait cards.

courses.title: Academic programmes for every stage
courses.text: From foundational literacy and numeracy to board-exam readiness, each stage has clear learning goals.

features.title: Organised learning, caring teachers, and useful parent communication
features.text: The website foregrounds the information Indian parents usually need before making an enquiry.

admissions.title: Admissions open for Nursery to Class XI
admissions.text: Parents can enquire online, call the admission office, download the prospectus, and schedule a campus visit.

facilities.title: Facilities that support academics and school life
facilities.text: Only configured facilities are displayed, with CMS-managed media and descriptions.

studentLife.title: Activities that develop confidence and leadership
studentLife.text: Sports, clubs, assemblies, cultural programmes, and competitions are presented as part of student development.

achievements.title: Student progress and school achievements
achievements.text: Board results, Olympiads, competitions, sports, arts, and certificates can be highlighted after verification.

events.title: Latest notices, news, and upcoming events
events.text: Parents can quickly scan current notices separately from news and events.

gallery.title: School life in pictures
gallery.text: Classroom learning, laboratories, events, sports, and student activities.

testimonials.title: What parents and students say
testimonials.text: Parent and student voices can be updated with approved school content.

cta.title: Speak with the admission office for Academic Year 2026-27.
cta.text: Share the class you are seeking admission for and the office will guide you through eligibility, documents, campus visit, and next steps.
